dailyNews.description: Kuwait International Airport faced multiple drone attacks on Saturday, which damaged its radar system. No casualties occurred, but the incident follows a previous attack on 25 March. Shuwaikh Port also sustained damage from a drone strike, impacting the country's trade operations.
